Bash(cd "F:/Projects/2026/Overberg Readymix" && .venv/Scripts/pip install django-debug-toolbar 2>&1 | tail -3 && DJANGO_SETTINGS_MODULE=Overberg_Readymix.settings.local DJANGO_SECRET_KEY=test .venv/Scripts/python manage.py check 2>&1)
Bash(cd "F:/Projects/2026/Overberg Readymix" && git add -A && git status 2>&1)
Bash(cd "F:/Projects/2026/Overberg Readymix" && git reset HEAD ".claude/memory/" "Overberg_Readymix/__pycache__/" 2>&1 && git status --short 2>&1)

Bash(cd "F:/Projects/2026/Overberg Readymix" && git commit -m "Docker, split settings, requirements, env scaffold

- Split settings.py → settings/{base,local,staging,production}.py
- requirements/{base,local,staging,production}.txt
- Dockerfile with multi-target \(local/staging/production\)
- scripts/entrypoint.sh \(migrate + collectstatic + gunicorn\)
- docker-compose.yml + local/staging/production overrides
- docker/traefik/ local+production stacks \(Traefik v3.3\)
- docker/portainer/ local+production stacks \(Portainer CE\)
- nginx/nginx.conf for production static/media serving
- .env.local, .env.staging, .env.production.example
- .gitignore \(excludes .env.production, staticfiles, .venv\)
- manage.py → default settings.local
- wsgi.py / asgi.py → default settings.production
- Anime.js v4.3.6 included in static/ \(served via WhiteNoise + collectstatic\)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>" 2>&1 && git push 2>&1)

Bash(cd "F:/Projects/2026/Overberg Readymix" && git add -A && git commit -m "Fix PyCharm settings module path + drop Nginx for WhiteNoise

- .idea/Overberg Readymix.iml: settingsModule → settings/local.py
  \(was pointing to old monolithic settings.py, causing DEBUG=False\)
- docker-compose.production.yml: remove nginx service, WhiteNoise
  serves static/media in all envs \(local/staging/production\)
- Remove nginx/ directory \(no longer needed\)

WhiteNoise config summary:
  local    → StaticFilesStorage \(no collectstatic\)
  staging  → CompressedManifestStaticFilesStorage \(via base\)
  prod     → CompressedManifestStaticFilesStorage + brotli compression

Co-Authored-By: Claude Sonnet 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>" && git push 2>&1)
